merchants.name: Café Müller
merchants.description: A cosy independent café on Jungfernstieg known for hand-pulled espresso, homemade cakes, and warm window seats. Popular with remote workers and locals looking for a quiet refuge from Hamburg's harbour wind.

rules.offer_headline_template: Cold outside? Your cappuccino is waiting.

merchants.name: Bäckerei Schönleber
merchants.description: A family-run bakery on the Zeil open since 1962, known for freshly baked pretzels, Laugenstangen, and seasonal pastries. Prices start under €2 — the go-to quick stop on Frankfurt's main shopping street.

rules.offer_headline_template: Fresh out of the oven — grab one before the lunch rush.

merchants.name: Metzger & Co.
merchants.description: A casual Bavarian lunch spot on Kaufingerstraße serving Weißwurst, Obatzda, and daily specials on a chalkboard menu. Busy at noon, calm by mid-afternoon.

rules.offer_headline_template: Lunch is on — table waiting for you.

merchants.name: Thalia München
merchants.description: Munich's flagship Thalia bookstore on Kaufingerstraße — three floors of books, audiobooks, stationery, and a reading corner near Marienplatz. Quietest in the early afternoon, ideal for unhurried browsing.

rules.offer_headline_template: A quiet afternoon — perfect for a new read.
